cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Richard could have gone to the bakery. So the problem gives us a bunch of events that Richard was doing at different times, and we need to find a time when he wasn't doing anything else, right? First, let's list out all the times Richard was occupied. He woke up at 8am. Then Betty saw him at the library from 9am to 2pm. So from 9 AM to 2 PM, he's reading. Then David saw him fixing a computer from 2pm to 4pm. So that's from 2 PM to 4 PM. Next, Mary saw him taking photos near the Eiffel Tower from 4pm to 5pm. Then Hannah saw him on a rooftop from 5pm to 6pm. After that, Susan saw him driving to the water park from 6pm to 7pm. And the bakery is closed after 7pm.
